microsoft_ft: Architected and scaled Azure's **recovery validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a self-service system, standardizing modular workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Shipped Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability in 4 months, achieving a **94% recovery rate** across hundreds of nodes, surfacing critical hardware defects, and establishing a scalable continuous-validation model for enterprise cloud infrastructure.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, requiring deep coordination across engineering, compliance, and partner teams.
Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring end-to-end workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill throughput capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Partnered with engineering and product counterparts across Databricks and SAP integrations to define acceptance criteria for resilience APIs, translating complex recovery workflows into **reliable, extensible backend services** deployable across sovereign and public cloud regions.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical gaps that led to the inclusion of **intent-based YAML generation**—turning complex infrastructure config into a guided, low-friction authoring experience.

Improved backend data quality and retrieval performance by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to a **semantic search system**, cutting average lookup time by 83% and improving accuracy for AI-powered queries across the platform.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a **phased automation roadmap** targeting critical-path workflows—reducing deployment risk and freeing engineers to focus on higher-leverage technical work.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil signals across 140+ teams, giving leadership a real-time view into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of backend tooling investments across the region-launch portfolio.

Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines** for embedded robotics software, accelerating the deployment cycle by 25% and enabling faster, safer iteration across a large distributed fleet.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives for a cross-functional engineering team, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to improve release predictability.

Collaborated closely with engineering and operations stakeholders to clarify requirements and refine acceptance criteria, ensuring delivered software matched **real production workflows** and met reliability standards for a safety-critical robotics environment.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM workflow that eliminated manual handoffs and gave leadership real-time pipeline visibility.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy—optimizing web UX and Google Business presence to create a higher-quality, lower-friction experience for new clients.
